injectables.description:
Storybook translation loader (DS/BC stories).

Responsibilities:

  • Loads keys for one or more modules via TRANSLATION_BASE_URL (GetByCultureAndKeys), when available.
  • Accepts the AutoTranslateDirective shape ({ moduleName: string | string[] }) as well as plain forms ('Common', ['Common']) and { module|modules|keys }.
  • Merges dictionaries as: API > STORY_DICTIONARY (mock). Converts flat keys ("Common.A11y.Foo": "...") into the nested object expected by ngx-translate.
  • Applies dictionaries with setTranslation(..., merge=true) and ensures the active language via setFallbackLang(...) + use(...). It does NOT call resetLang (to avoid clearing the store).
  • Reads TRANSLATION_BASE_URL and STORY_DICTIONARY from the module injector at call time, so per-story overrides are honored (no global provider needed).
  • Memoizes by (lang|keys|baseUrl|mockSig) to prevent duplicate HTTP calls.
injectables.rawdescription:
Storybook translation loader (DS/BC stories).

Responsibilities:
- Loads keys for one or more modules via TRANSLATION_BASE_URL (GetByCultureAndKeys), when available.
- Accepts the AutoTranslateDirective shape ({ moduleName: string | string[] }) as well as plain forms ('Common', ['Common']) and { module|modules|keys }.
- Merges dictionaries as: API > STORY_DICTIONARY (mock). Converts flat keys ("Common.A11y.Foo": "...") into the nested object expected by ngx-translate.
- Applies dictionaries with setTranslation(..., merge=true) and ensures the active language via setFallbackLang(...) + use(...). It does NOT call resetLang (to avoid clearing the store).
- Reads TRANSLATION_BASE_URL and STORY_DICTIONARY from the module injector at call time, so per-story overrides are honored (no global provider needed).
- Memoizes by (lang|keys|baseUrl|mockSig) to prevent duplicate HTTP calls.

variables.name: META
norm
variables.defaultValue: (s: string): string => s.trim()

variables.name: normArr
variables.defaultValue:
(a?: string[] | null): string[] | undefined =>
  a?.length ? Array.from(new Set(a.map(norm))).sort(byLocale) : undefined

variables.name: STORYBOOK_PROVIDERS
variables.defaultValue:
[
  AnalyticsService,
  AnalyticsGaGtmColivingRewriteService,
  PageViewStrategyService,
  AnalyticsStrategiesService,
  AmplitudeService,
  GoogleAnalyticsService,
  GTMService,
  YandexMetricaService,
  {
    provide: PointOfSaleService,
    useClass: PosServiceFake,
  },
]

variables.name: TRANSLATION_BASE_URL
variables.defaultValue: new InjectionToken<string>('TRANSLATION_BASE_URL')

variables.name: withI18nAutoHost
variables.description:
Lazily wraps a story in only if the story declares i18n. Modules are read from parameters.i18nModules (string | string[]).

Example per-story: export const MyStory = { parameters: { i18nModules: ['Common','Schedule'] } }

variables.name: withStoryTranslationsAuto
variables.rawdescription: Reads `parameters.i18n` so each story can choose between API and mock dictionaries.
variables.description: Reads parameters.i18n so each story can choose between API and mock dictionaries.

functions.name: createBaseProviders
functions.description: Creates shared base providers for Storybook decorators This is a helper to avoid duplicating the base provider setup

functions.name: createSharedDecorators
functions.description: Creates shared decorators with optional additional providers Use this to extend the base configuration with module-specific providers

jsdoctags.comment:
Example :
// Basic usage - no additional providers needed
const decorators = createSharedDecorators();

// With additional providers
import { AuthService } from '@dcx/ui/libs';
const decorators = createSharedDecorators([
  { provide: AuthService, useClass: AuthServiceMock }
]);

functions.name: i18nTestingImportsWithMemoryLoader
functions.description: Use this when the template uses the |translate pipe. Example: imports: [ ...i18nTestingImportsWithMemoryLoader({ 'Common.Next': 'Next' }) ]

functions.name: i18nTestingProvidersWithServiceStub
functions.description: Use this when only instant()/get() is called in TS code. Provides a stub service instead of the pipe.

functions.name: initializeStorybook
functions.deprecationMessage:
Use the automatic initialization by importing sharedPreviewConfig.
This function is kept for backward compatibility but will be removed in future versions.
functions.description: Initialize shared Storybook functionality This is called automatically when this module is imported. No need to call it explicitly in your preview.ts files.

functions.name: isDispatchValid
functions.description:
Returns true if (eventName, accounts) is valid according to CONFIG.

  • Empty/undefined accounts → there must be at least one effective engine WITHOUT accounts.
  • Non-empty accounts → there must be at least one effective engine with EXACTLY those accounts.

functions.name: registerAllLocales
functions.description:
Registers all Angular locale data for internationalization support. This enables proper formatting of dates, numbers, and currencies across all supported locales.

Call this once at the beginning of your preview.ts file:

Example :
import { registerAllLocales } from '@dcx/ui/storybook-utils';
registerAllLocales();
